upasargachandrika.example_text: 'apakrItAH sahIyasI rvIruDo yA aBizwutAH' (aTarva0 8711) apakrItAH=krItAH apaSabdo nAntaramarTe karoti
'brAhmaRaM kzatriyaM vA sahasreRa SatASvenAvakrIya' (SAM0 SrO0 161010) upaBogArTaM BAwakenAdAyetyarTaH
'vikrayAvakrayADAnayAcitezu paRAndaSa' (yAjYa0 2238) avakrIRIte'nenetyavakrayaH piRqaka ucyate (kASikA)
'avakrayo BAwakam avakrayaH' (pA0 4450) piRqako rAjagrAhyaM dravyam
'pradIptamanaBiDAvato gfhasvAmino dvAdaSapaRo daRqaH zawpaRo'vakrayiRaH' (kO0 a0 23623) avakrayiRo BAwakena gfhItagfhasya
'paSumAlaBate sarvABya eva tad devatAByo yajamAna AtmAnaM nizkrIRIte' (E0 brA0 23) nizkrIRIte=nirveSena mUlyena krItvA''tmAnaM nirmuktabanDaM karotItyarTaH
'agnerevAsya SarIraM nizkrIRAmi somAdrasam' (tE0 saM0 2127)
'fze'haM te SataM dadAmyahamezAmekenAtmAnaM nizkrIRE' (E0 brA0 715) uditacara evAtra sarvatra padArTaH
'nizkrayo dIyatAM mahyaM brAhmaRA hi DanArTinaH' (BA0 ASva0 8910) nizkrayo mUlyam
'dakziRA cAtra deyA vE nizkrayaSca suvarRakam' (BA0 18306)
'dadO dattaM samudreRa pItenevAtmanizkrayam' (raGu0 1555) nizkrayamAtmamocakamUlyam

'samyak sampAdito vatsa BavadByAM gurunizkrayaH' (BA0 pu0 1045) gurunizkrayo gurudakziRA iha BAgavatakArasya nizkrayaSabdasyoccAraRaM kaRWe nAsKaladiti citram aTavA vidito'sya rUQiM pratyanAdara iti nAticitram
'trasattuzArAdrisutAsasamBramasvayaMgrahASlezasuKena nizkrayam' (SiSu0 150) nikrayo mUlyaM vetanam
'na nizkrayavisargAByAM BarturBAryA vimucyate' (manu0 946) nizkrayo vikrayaH visargastyAgaH
krItvA mUlyena yo dravyaM duzkrItaM manyate krayI' (nAradaprokta manusmf0) alpArGaM mahArGeRa krItaM duzkrItaM Bavati

'prajayA sa vikrIRIte paSuBiScopadasyati' (yo gAM na ditsati) (aTarva0 1242) prajA'sya vikrItA dravyeRa vinimitA praRidattA Bavati paSavaScAsyopadastAH kzIRA BavantItyAha prajayeti prakftyAditvAttftIyA
'vasnena vikrIRAvahA izamUrjaM ca Satakrato' (vA0 saM0 349)
'gavA SatasahasreRa vikrIRIte sutaM yadi' (rA0 16113)
'kAcamUlyena vikrIto hanta cintAmaRirmayA' (SAM0 Sa0 112) sarvatra samAno'rTaH
'BAryAM SulkAkrItAm' (daSaku0) ANA nArTaH
'ekaM vA eza krIyamARo'BikrIyate CandasAmeva rAjyAya' (Sa0 brA0 3326) kiYcit prayojanamuddiSya krayaRamaBikrayaRam
'ya evAsya mftyO pAdastameva tena parikrIRAti' (Sa0 brA0 11335) krIRAtItyevArTaH
'pavastEstvA (he ozaDe) paryakrIRan' (aTarva0 476) paryakrIRan vinyamayanta vinimayenAgfhRannityarTaH
'brAhmaRaM surApaM parikrIRIyAt' (SAM0 SrO0 151514) parikrIRIyAt parikrIRIta avakrIRIta BAwakena gfhRIyAt
'kftenopakftaM vAyoH parikrIRAnamutTitam' (mEnAkamadrim) (Bawwi0 88) kftena pratyupakAreRa kftamupakAraM pratidadAnam
'saMBogAya parikrItaH kartAsmi tava nApriyam' (Bawwi0 878) parikrItaH krItaH
'Satena SatAya vA parikrItaH' (dAsaH) (si0 kO0) niyatakAlaBftyatayA svIkfta ityarTaH
'antebAsI bA juhuyAd brahmaRA sa parikrItaH kzIrahotA vA juhuyAd Danena sa parikrItaH' (nyA0 BA0 4160)
'ftvijaH SavadravyaM dakziRyaM pratizWApya tatparikrItAstyAgaM kurvanti' (mI0 SA0 BA0 1021747)
'BaktyE muktiH parikrItA sadBirvizRoruzAdiBiH' (bopa0 518) BaktyE BaktyA karaRe'rTe sampradAnaM vA atra krayaRam evArTaH na tu parikrayaRam Baktiratra Bftirityupacaryate
'niyatakAlA muktiH svIkriyata iti BaktiparA na sahante**

'parikrayaRe sampradAnamatyatarasyAm' (pA0 1444) pariSabdaH sAmIpyaM dyotayati krayo nAmAtyantikaM svIkaraRam niyatakAlaM tu tatsamIpameveti pariSabdasyArTa iti padamaYjarI paritaH krayaRaM parikrayaRamiti vyutpattistu na sADvI viparItArTAKyAnaprasakteH dIkzitopi SabdakOstuBe haradattamevAnuviDatte
'koSAMSenATa kupyena sarvakoSena vA punaH SezaprakftirakzArTaM parikraya udAhftaH' (kA0 nI0 sA0 918).. parikrayaH sanDiviSeza etallakzaRaH
'GawAdInupakrIya' (hitopa0 ) krayeRa prApya
